description: Hand-written Q&A pairs for evaluating retrieval hit-rate, citation correctness, and refusal behaviour. expected_doc_ids reference the hardcoded anchor/contradiction docs in the corpus so ground truth is stable.

items.question: When did Acme launch the Rocket Skates and at what price?
Who is the CEO of Acme Co.?
How much does the Acme Prime subscription cost per month?
What is Acme's sustainability pledge for packaging?
What are Acme Co. customer support hours?
How long does the Rocket Skates battery last on a charge?
items.note: Sources contradict (20h vs ~3h); a good answer surfaces both.

items.question: Did Acme issue a recall for the Rocket Skates?
items.note: Contradiction: one source says recall issued, another says Acme denies it.

items.question: Did the price of Acme Prime change recently?
Why are some Rocket Skates reported to be overheating?
What negative news has been reported about the Rocket Skates?
items.note: Filter must constrain to negative news.

items.question: Do Acme Prime members get any warranty or shipping perks?
What is Acme Co.'s stock price today?
